zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在1726附近横盘整理，短线走势偏弱，整体仍处于均线下方运行，反弹动能有限，市场情绪谨慎观望结构偏空修复不足

技术指标方面，价格持续低于20日均线1732一带，均线系统呈压制状态，MACD维持负值运行，动能柱偏弱，缺乏趋势性反转信号

下方支撑关注1725至1718区域，若失守可能进一步回踩1700整数关口；上方阻力位于1732与1740附近，突破需放量确认

操作上建议维持区间思路，未有效突破前以高抛低吸为主，控制杠杆与仓位风险，等待方向选择后顺势跟随短线保持谨慎避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bearish-to-neutral intraday structure as price action remains pinned near the session low. The inability to hold above the 1730 region suggests weakening bullish momentum, while the market continues to compress below the 20-day simple moving average. Overall structure reflects consolidation with a slight downside bias, as buyers fail to generate meaningful continuation beyond recent short-term highs with limited bullish follow-through evident.

The MACD reading at -0.069 confirms waning bullish momentum and suggests that bearish pressure is gradually building, although no signal line is currently provided for confirmation. Price trading below the 20-period SMA reinforces a short-term bearish tilt. With RSI unavailable, momentum clarity is limited, but current positioning indicates sellers are slightly in control unless reclaim of moving average occurs overall outlook.

Immediate support sits at the current session low near 1726.5, and a sustained break below this level could expose downside toward 1710 and then the psychological 1700 zone. On the upside, resistance is first seen at 1731.24, followed by the 20-day SMA around 1732.29. A breakout above this cluster would be required to neutralize near-term bearish pressure and shift momentum back toward bullish consolidation.

Traders may consider adopting a range-bound strategy while price remains between support at 1726.5 and resistance near 1732.3. Short positions may be favored on rejection from the 20-day SMA, with tight risk management above 1735. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above resistance could justify long exposure targeting 1750. Until then, volatility compression suggests patience and disciplined entries are essential in current market conditions.
